TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ((biru' na zayzyuwaw:President Taur Matan Ruak.jpg|thumb|Taur Matan Ruak|alt=) Taur Matan Ruak ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 10, Taur Matan Ruak, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Timor-leste ta' misuw hya' ga Taur Matan Ruak, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ((ő≤iru Ē na zajzjuwaw:pres~…ēi*ent taur matan ruak.jp…£|tńßumő≤|taur matan ruak|alt=) taur matan ruak rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, taur matan ruak, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw timor-les~…ēte ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a taur matan ruak, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ((biru' na zayzyuwaw:President Taur Matan Ruak.jpg|thumb|Taur Matan Ruak|alt=) Taur Matan Ruak ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 10, Taur Matan Ruak, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Timor-leste ta' misuw hya' ga Taur Matan Ruak, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw timor-les~…ēte ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a taur matan ruak, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
